text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from our outing, Grass Wonder
tells me there's somewhere she wants to visit, so
we stop by an inn.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hello, everyone. It's been a while.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Hey, it's Grass! Long time no see!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Hi, Grass! What are we gonna play today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A warm smile grows across Grass Wonder's face as
the excited children flock around her.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, they're the children of this inn's proprietors.
They're very knowledgeable about traditional
Japanese games.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We bonded over a game of otedama the last time
I visited.

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
We played lots and lots! We did ohajiki, ayatori,
karuta, and tons more.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We sure did. Learning so many new things was fun
for me, as well.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: So, what shall we do today?

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I think we probably showed you all the
games we know already.

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Why don't you teach us a game you
played when you were little?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Huh? Me?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But... I didn't really get to play any Japanese
games when I was young. What to do?
choice_data_list:
What types of games did you play in the
States?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
What types? Well... it's just that I'm not sure if
these children would really enjoy—

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Oh, I forgot! You're from America! That's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I wanna know what you play in
America!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Very well... I guess I do know a game called Simon
Says.

text_block_list.name: Boy
text_block_list.text: Simon?! What a cool name!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I guess it would have some flair for being
foreign.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
America and Japan. I wouldn't be who I am today
without them both.
choice_data_list: Tell us more about the United States.
Tell us more about the United States.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
America and Japan. I wouldn't be who I am today
without them both.
choice_data_list: Tell us more about the United States.
Tell us more about the United States.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Sure. So, in this game, one person plays the role
of "Simon," and everyone else has to do what
Simon says.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Experience is the best teacher. I'll start, and you
can follow my lead.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Let's see... Oh yes. Simon says, right hand up...

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: But I don't know English!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh... I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I guess I got too excited about sharing something
from back home...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The four of us play together until the sun goes
down, and I get to learn a lot about Grass
Wonder's feelings toward her home country.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Gladly. There's so much I could tell you.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My father fits the typical image of a confident,
rough-around-the-edges American, but he loves
Japan dearly.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile my mother is the polar
opposite—unfailingly gentle and polite. She's
something of a role model for me, actually.
choice_data_list: You take after both of them.
You take after both of them.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Perhaps I do.

text_block_list.name: Girl
text_block_list.text: Hey! Can we play now?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry. Yes, let's get started.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I can tell you more on the way back to
the academy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We play until the sun goes down. Later, as we're
returning to the academy, she tells me all about
her happy memories from back home.
